name: Overtuned Biomorphosis Rush (Second Ascension Perk)
description: A build that exploits the Overtuned origin's hidden mechanic: you can take Biomorphosis ascension as your SECOND ascension perk instead of third. This lets you reach endgame biological ascension incredibly quickly. Combined with massive pop growth from Overtuned traits (+40% pop growth from start), Genesis Guides civic (unity from colonization/uplifting), and later switching to Crowdsourced Research (factions produce science), this build scales exponentially through quality pops and rapid ascension.

strategy.core_mechanic: Overtuned origin's HIDDEN BENEFIT: You can take Biomorphosis ascension perk as your SECOND perk instead of third. This is HUGE in 4.0 meta where rushing ascension perks gives massive power spikes. Normal empires must wait for third perk, but Overtuned bypasses this restriction.
strategy.overtuned_benefits: Access to special Overtuned traits (yellow traits) that give major bonuses but reduce lifespan by -30 years. Pre-Planned Growth: +30% pop growth, -15% housing usage. Start with Gene Tailoring tech, +1 trait pick, +3 modification points. Can add/remove Overtuned traits through genetic modification. Can activate 'Damn the Consequences' edict: +100% positive trait effects but +100% pop upkeep (use when you have economy to support it).
strategy.trait_strategy: Intelligent (+10% research) mandatory. Natural Sociologists for biological ship tech spam. Rapid Breeders (+10% pop growth) stacks with Pre-Planned Growth (+30%) = 40% pop growth from start! This is INSANE pop scaling. Only take ONE Overtuned trait (-30 years lifespan) - more than one tanks lifespan too much.
strategy.civic_synergy: Parliamentary System: Early unity from factions. Genesis Guides: Get unity + influence every time you colonize + can uplift primitives for more unity. CRITICAL for rushing ascension perks. Later swap Parliamentary System for Crowdsourced Research (factions produce science instead of unity) once you have enough unity flow.
strategy.ethics_choice: Egalitarian: +faction output (more unity from Parliamentary System). Materialist: Civilians produce research (scales with pop growth). Militarist: Optional (creator used for community game) - civilians give naval capacity. Can swap for Pacifist/Xenophile. IMPORTANT: Don't take Fanatic ethics - you need to reform government to swap civics later.
strategy.opening_strategy: 1. Start on Tropical preference (better food districts for bio ships). 2. Research specialized tech buildings (+1 per 100 researchers). 3. Buy 20 minerals immediately. 4. Build mining/research stations with food cost (Genesis arks). 5. Set Isolationist stance (+10% unity). 6. Rush monument for civilian jobs (they produce trade from Egalitarian). 7. Remove stronghold (useless upkeep). 8. Promote Egalitarian faction for unity.
strategy.early_game: Focus on colonizing planets with Genesis Guides for unity bursts. Uplift primitives when found. Rush Discovery + Prosperity traditions. Take One Vision as first ascension perk. Take Evolutionary Mastery (Biomorphosis) as SECOND perk (normally requires 3rd slot!). Start aggressive genetic modification.
strategy.mid_game: After Biomorphosis: Use genetic modification to min-max species for different roles. Add/remove Overtuned traits as needed. Activate 'Damn the Consequences' when economy is strong. Reform government to swap Parliamentary System → Crowdsourced Research. Now factions produce science! With massive pop growth, science explodes.
strategy.late_game: Pop growth + quality genetics + Crowdsourced Research = exponential scaling. Can reach advanced tech incredibly fast. Use biological ships (benefits from Natural Sociologists). Continue uplifting/colonizing for more pops.
strategy.game_settings: Creator plays on Grand Admiral, 0.75 tech/tradition cost (shows how fast ascension rush works even with CHEAPER costs!), standard pop growth, midgame scaling at year 50.
strategy.why_broken: Normally reaching Biomorphosis requires: 1st perk → 2nd perk → 3rd perk (Biomorphosis). Overtuned lets you do: 1st perk → 2nd perk (BIOMORPHOSIS!). You save 1 full perk cycle = years of game time. Combined with Genesis Guides unity generation and 40% pop growth, you hit biological ascension when other empires are still in early traditions.

dlcs: Toxoids Species Pack (required for Overtuned origin)
difficulty: Medium - Requires understanding genetic modification and civic swapping timing
notes: Creator shows progression at year 20, 30, and 40 to demonstrate scaling. The key insight is that Overtuned lets you access Biomorphosis 1 perk earlier than normal, which is huge in 4.0 meta where ascension perks are extremely powerful. Don't stack multiple Overtuned traits (-30 years each) - lifespan gets too low. Reform government after getting sufficient unity to swap Parliamentary System for Crowdsourced Research for science scaling.
